name: Oyster Strawberry
steps: Wrap the oysters in greaseproof paper to prevent tearing when sealed in the vacuum.
Vacuum with the oil and cook at 60C for 8 hours.
Strain and store in a squeezy bottle.
Spin the strawberry puree in the centrifuge for 2 hours.
Separate solid and put to one side.
Use 200g of the liquid mix with the lemon juice and the orange blossom.
Dissolve and store in two containers with ice.
